nasb.text: And in her was found the blood of prophets and of saints and of all who have been slain on the earth.”

esv.text: And in her was found the blood of prophets and of saints, and of all who have been slain on earth.”

cnv.text: 先知、聖徒和地上一切被殺的人的血， 都在這城裡找到了！”

ccb.text: 你的城墙内流满了众先知、 众圣徒和地上一切被杀之人的血。”

csbs.text: 而且先知们、圣徒们以及地上一切被杀之人的血， 在你那里都被发现了。”
